title: Improve V3MergeCond by reordering statements
body:
V3MergeCond merges consecutive conditional `_ = cond ? _ : _` and
`if (cond) ...` statements. This patch adds an analysis and ordering
phase that moves statements with identical conditions closer to each
other, in order to enable more merging opportunities. This in turn
eliminates a lot of repeated conditionals which reduced dynamic branch
count and branch misprediction rate

This is helpful for performance and build time. Performance with my
standard OpenTitan benchmark is as follows (about 2.5% speedup,
and I finally hit an IPC > 1 yay!):

```
// master:

      59,977.31 msec task-clock                #    1.000 CPUs utilized            ( +-  0.03% )
             82      context-switches          #    0.001 K/sec                    ( +- 40.28% )
              0      cpu-migrations            #    0.000 K/sec
          1,430      page-faults               #    0.024 K/sec
209,798,377,329      cycles                    #    3.498 GHz                      ( +-  0.03% )
206,783,685,808      instructions              #    0.99  insn per cycle           ( +-  0.00% )
 11,324,243,166      branches                  #  188.809 M/sec                    ( +-  0.00% )
    185,879,401      branch-misses             #    1.64% of all branches          ( +-  0.50% )

        59.9806 +- 0.0168 seconds time elapsed  ( +-  0.03% )

// Improved merging:

      58,498.52 msec task-clock                #    1.000 CPUs utilized            ( +-  0.05% )
             80      context-switches          #    0.001 K/sec                    ( +- 40.10% )
              0      cpu-migrations            #    0.000 K/sec
          1,428      page-faults               #    0.024 K/sec
204,625,635,595      cycles                    #    3.498 GHz                      ( +-  0.05% )
205,825,130,320      instructions              #    1.01  insn per cycle           ( +-  0.00% )
 10,935,311,938      branches                  #  186.933 M/sec                    ( +-  0.00% )
    159,406,663      branch-misses             #    1.46% of all branches          ( +-  1.23% )

        58.5016 +- 0.0283 seconds time elapsed  ( +-  0.05% )
```

Verilation time is about 0.2 second longer, so the implementation is quite
efficient (~60 sec min to Verilate this benchmark), so I am quite happy with
the algorithm. I could use your wisdom on whether more nodes should be
marked `m_isFence` (testsuite, ext texts and OpenTitan are happy as is).

As a curiosity, I recommend looking at a diff of the output of `t_case_write1`
with and without the conditional Merging (`-Ow`), it is now quite satisfying.
